intentSynonyms: show me my replays in sentry
see all my replays in sentry
list session replays in the organization in sentry
description: List session replays for the current Sentry organization. Replays capture user browser sessions including DOM interactions, console logs, and network requests.

project.description: Filter by project IDs. Omit to list replays across all projects

query.description: Search query to filter replays (e.g., by URL or error)

limit.description: Maximum number of replays to return (default 25, max 100)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response
